summary: Recent evidence shows that perinatal education strengthens clinicians’ identification of high-risk pregnancy markers and promotes effective interprofessional collaboration, leading to better anticipation of complications and improved obstetric decision-making. \boxed{A}
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Recent evidence shows that perinatal education strengthens clinicians’ identification of high-risk pregnancy markers and promotes effective interprofessional collaboration, leading to better anticipation of complications and improved obstetric decision-making. \boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
